name: veritrace
description: Traceability-first agentic framework: human-reviewed LLM rule authoring + symbolic BDI reasoning

scripts.test:trace: node tools/trace/parse-jason-trace.mjs tools/trace/fixtures/gc04.jason-trace.log output/traces/gc04.trace.json && node tools/trace/validate-trace.mjs expected/traces/gc04.expected.json output/traces/gc04.trace.json
scripts.test: npm run validate:rules && npm run validate:compilation && npm run test:validate && npm run test:compile && npm run test:trace
